_doc: Durable item-granularity GitHub universe sweep ledger. Keys are <repo>#<number>. New open items seed as disposition queued; retroactive previously unseen closed items seed as reopen-candidate. Later engagement may promote rows to evolving, distilled, merged, or superseded:<durable-receipt>. Ledger dispositions MUST NOT include closed or dismissed — GitHub state is reference data only, never terminal forgetting. Automatic task emission remains gated by value-repos.json: unranked repos are recorded here and fed into discovery/ranking, not directly budgeted into dev work.
